summary: A 2018 DHS 'If You See Something, Say Something' counterterrorism PSA showing travelers at a hotel valet, a restaurant, and a family at an outdoor party, with a voiceover urging people to stay aware of their surroundings and report suspicious activity to local authorities. It is a narrated awareness spot, not a music-driven spectacle or pop-culture genre experiment, and predates the second Trump administration. Out of scope: narration-led informational PSA with no song-driven cinematic styling and no youth/genre appeal.
notable_text: Report suspicious activity to local authorities. / If You See Something, Say Something (used with permission of the NY Metropolitan Transportation Authority). / Homeland Security.
